transcripts.help:
usage:
  flywheel preflight [args...]
  flywheel init --repo PATH --json
  flywheel doctor --repo PATH --json
  flywheel health --json
  flywheel repair --scope reduced --repo PATH --dry-run --json
  flywheel validate repo --repo PATH --json
  flywheel validate receipt --repo PATH --file PATH --json
  flywheel audit --repo PATH --json
  flywheel why ID --json
  flywheel tick --repo PATH --dry-run --json
  flywheel dispatch --repo PATH --simulate --json
  flywheel validate-receipt --repo PATH --file PATH --json
  flywheel inspect --repo PATH --json
  flywheel capabilities --json
  flywheel robot-docs guide
  flywheel quickstart --json
  flywheel help TOPIC --json
  flywheel completion bash|zsh
  flywheel --examples
  flywheel --info

Planned commands that are not public-release-ready yet:
  full-mode harness dispatch through NTM/Agent Mail

Agent automation:
  Start with: flywheel capabilities --json
  Diagnose:   flywheel doctor --repo "$PWD" --json
  Preview:    flywheel repair --scope reduced --repo "$PWD" --dry-run --json
  Exit codes: 0 success, 30 repo state missing/invalid, 64 usage error
transcripts.robot_docs:
Flywheel robot guide:
1. Discover: flywheel capabilities --json
2. Diagnose: flywheel doctor --repo "$PWD" --json
3. Preview repair: flywheel repair --scope reduced --repo "$PWD" --dry-run --json
4. Preview work: flywheel tick --repo "$PWD" --dry-run --json
5. Simulate dispatch: flywheel dispatch --repo "$PWD" --simulate --json
6. Validate receipt: flywheel validate-receipt --repo "$PWD" --file .flywheel/last_closeout_receipt.json --json
Use stdout as data; usage errors and diagnostics go to stderr.

transcripts.help:
usage: storage-probe.sh [SUBCOMMAND] [OPTIONS]

Backward-compatible run mode: default invocation routes to the original
top-level logic (now exposed as `cmd_run`).

Canonical CLI surfaces:
  doctor [--json]          probe substrate health
  health [--json]          last-run status
  repair --scope <s>       repair misconfigured state
                            Default: --dry-run; mutate with --apply --idempotency-key KEY
  validate <subject> [...] validate per-subject contract (TODO: define subjects)
  audit [--json]           recent run history
  why <id>                 explain provenance for a given id (TODO: id semantics)
  quickstart [--json]      operator orientation
  help <topic>             topic help (run | doctor | health | repair | validate)
  completion <shell>       emit bash or zsh completion

Introspection:
  --info --json            version, paths, env vars, dependencies, sha256
  --schema [<surface>]     JSON Schema for output envelopes
  --examples --json        curated workflow examples
  --help / -h              this help
transcripts.robot_docs:
Storage probe robot guide:
1. Discover: storage-probe.sh capabilities --json
2. Read current state: storage-probe.sh --json
3. Test with fixture: storage-probe.sh --fixture PATH --json
4. Append history only when requested: storage-probe.sh --record-history --json
5. Treat stdout as JSON data; diagnostics and usage errors go to stderr.
